subcodes.title: The Clouds That Obscure the Sun of Truth: Words spoken on 1911-10-27 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The day is fine, the air is pure, the sun shines, no mist nor cloud obscures its radiance. These brilliant rays penetrate into all parts of the city
subcodes.first_line_orig: در انجیل میفرماید هر وقت حضرت مسیح میاید سوار بر ابر است جمال مبارک در تفسیر
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @symbolism, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @twofold; threefold station of the Manifestation of God, @birth of Christ; purity; virginity of Mary
